subject: v1.2.5
body: ## [1.2.5](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.2.4...v1.2.5) (2016-03-02) ### Bug Fixes * **hierarchicalMenu:** configure maxValuesPerFacet using the limit option ([4868717](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/4868717)), closes [#66](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/66)
